[]:             Quote Post by Beatle » Sun Oct 10, 2004 11:05 pm I have several hundred images, some by Sadamoto but I wouldn't know the difference. Kinda funny but I was on ebay looking around and saw that someone was selling a CD with images. In the title was Sadamoto's name and the samples the seller showed were great. I was going to make a web page and figured this would give me lots of images to use that I didn't have to go searching for, so for six dollars I bought it. Of course it was full of hentai and just down right porn. There are far too many for me to go through but here is an index with a few presentable. http://www.scottrchambers.com/eva/
